response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches 'Rivals and Equals' and the intro to 'I can't control myself'. Spoken banter was manually transcribed. 2. JSON Usage: Reference lyrics were used for song sections; manual transcription and translation were performed for the lengthy audience interaction segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly anchored to vocal onset. Applied aggressive truncation for continuous song lines (Line 1 'e' equals Line 2 's') and included a visual text block for the song title reveal.

subtitles.original: Lightning never strikes twice in the same spot
subtitles.english: Lightning never strikes twice in the same spot

subtitles.original: So go ahead and run up on me till you get your shot
subtitles.english: So go ahead and run up on me till you get your shot

subtitles.original: I see the weapon that you're hiding, come on ready or not
subtitles.english: I see the weapon that you're hiding, come on ready or not

subtitles.original: Another life and you would never give a second thought
subtitles.english: Another life and you would never give a second thought

subtitles.original: Hello, みなさん！
subtitles.english: Hello, everyone!

subtitles.original: Yeah yeah! Woo! This is... whoa, thank you!
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah! Woo! This is... whoa, thank you!

subtitles.original: This is Mori Calliope, 森カリオペです。
subtitles.english: This is Mori Calliope, I'm Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much everybody for coming to my birthday live!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much everybody for coming to my birthday live!

subtitles.original: Here is the hashtag, #UNCUTROCK, right here, right here, right here.
subtitles.english: Here is the hashtag, #UNCUTROCK, right here, right here, right here.

subtitles.original: Check it out, everybody!
subtitles.english: Check it out, everybody!

subtitles.original: Today's theme is obviously birthday, right? It's my birthday!
subtitles.english: Today's theme is obviously birthday, right? It's my birthday!

subtitles.original: And so, if you look behind us, we've got stones!
subtitles.english: And so, if you look behind us, we've got stones!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! What kind of stones, I wonder?
subtitles.english: Oh my god! What kind of stones, I wonder?

subtitles.original: Maybe... birthday stones? Depending on the guest, I suppose.
subtitles.english: Maybe... birthday stones? Depending on the guest, I suppose.

subtitles.original: Mori Calliope is diamond.
subtitles.english: Mori Calliope is diamond.

subtitles.original: So, of course, you will see white behind me.
subtitles.english: So, of course, you will see white behind me.

subtitles.original: Yes, and the idea is to sing original songs with guests,
subtitles.english: Yes, and the idea is to sing original songs with guests,

subtitles.original: and also my own songs.
subtitles.english: and also my own songs.

subtitles.original: And I'm looking at the comments right now. Now the show isn't very high quality,
subtitles.english: And I'm looking at the comments right now. Now the show isn't very high quality,

subtitles.original: so there's like a pretty big lag, but I'm looking. Woo! Woo!
subtitles.english: so there's like a pretty big lag, but I'm looking. Woo! Woo!

subtitles.original: Phew, there's a lot of clapping emojis. Holy cannoli!
subtitles.english: Phew, there's a lot of clapping emojis. Holy cannoli!

subtitles.original: Holy cannoli is right! こんばんは、こんばんは！
subtitles.english: Holy cannoli is right! Good evening, good evening!

subtitles.original: コメント見てます。
subtitles.english: I'm looking at the comments.

subtitles.original: Wow, すごい！ "Happy birthday", "happy birthday".
subtitles.english: Wow, amazing! "Happy birthday", "happy birthday".

subtitles.original: Happy birthday wishes, ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday wishes, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: And you know what, behind me is not only stones,
subtitles.english: And you know what, behind me is not only stones,

subtitles.original: but I also have a fabulous band joining me!
subtitles.english: but I also have a fabulous band joining me!

subtitles.original: Yes, that's right! Live band!
subtitles.english: Yes, that's right! Live band!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much to the band for coming.
subtitles.english: Thank you so much to the band for coming.

subtitles.original: Now, in particular, we have somebody that Calliope and I really respect.
subtitles.english: Now, in particular, we have somebody that Calliope and I really respect.

subtitles.original: Today, Park-san is here with us!
subtitles.english: Today, Park-san is here with us!

subtitles.original: カリちゃん、Happy Birthday!
subtitles.english: Calli-chan, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you! 今日はよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Thank you! I'm looking forward to working with you today!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: I'm looking forward to it as well.

subtitles.original: Yeah, Park-san is one of my favorite bass players ever.
subtitles.english: Yeah, Park-san is one of my favorite bass players ever.

subtitles.original: He's done two songs for me, in particular, Orpheus and Sepia.
subtitles.english: He's done two songs for me, in particular, Orpheus and Sepia.

subtitles.original: OrpheusとSepiaのベースやってくれました。
subtitles.english: He played the bass for Orpheus and Sepia.

subtitles.original: Park-sanはすごいリスペクトしてます。はい！
subtitles.english: I really respect Park-san. Yes!

subtitles.original: But I have so many wonderful members in the band today,
subtitles.english: But I have so many wonderful members in the band today,

subtitles.original: and also guests as well, and I don't want to take up too much more time...
subtitles.english: and also guests as well, and I don't want to take up too much more time...

subtitles.original: But anyway, we should probably sing with guests,
subtitles.english: But anyway, we should probably sing with guests,

subtitles.original: because I want to showcase all that we've been practicing too, together.
subtitles.english: because I want to showcase all that we've been practicing too, together.

subtitles.original: So, let's go ahead and begin!
subtitles.english: So, let's go ahead and begin!

subtitles.original: The first... the first guest, come on!
subtitles.english: The first... the first guest, come on!

subtitles.original: I can't control myself
subtitles.english: [On-screen: I can't control myself]

subtitles.english: In a distorted world, a sound heard faintly

subtitles.english: It's as if just the two of us were cut away from the world

subtitles.original: 届きそうな手　すれ違った心
subtitles.english: Hands that almost reached, hearts that passed each other by

subtitles.original: ちょっと痛むんだ
subtitles.english: It hurts a little

subtitles.english: Wait here

subtitles.english: Still unable to decide

subtitles.english: I'm overflowing with confusion

subtitles.english: I've repeated it so many times now
